problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
